description_long: This object represents a human jogger in mid-stride, with a slender build and upright posture. The arms are bent at the elbows, swinging in opposition to the legs, which are positioned in a running gait with one leg forward and the other back. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted short-sleeve shirt and shorts, with running shoes on the feet. The surface is smooth and monochromatic, lacking detailed facial or clothing textures, suggesting a stylized or minimalistic representation. No visible accessories, headwear, or distinguishing features are present. The overall form is compact and proportionate, typical of an adult engaged in jogging.
description: A stylized, upright human jogger in mid-stride, wearing a fitted shirt, shorts, and running shoes, with arms and legs in a dynamic running pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jogger's chest, face, and forward arm and leg positions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the jogger's stride, with one arm and one leg clearly extended.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the trailing leg and arm.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alternate profile of the jogger's running motion.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted short-sleeve shirt and knee-length shorts, both appearing smooth and form-fitting, likely made of synthetic material.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes with a low profile and moderate sole thickness, matching the overall monochrome color scheme.
attribute_running_posture: Upright running posture with arms bent at the elbows, swinging in opposition to the legs; one leg is extended forward while the other is back, indicating a mid-stride dynamic pose.
